display.name: Watchfire Ruin Cache
display.short_description: A ranger watchfire lies cold beneath a sagging lean-to. Warm stones still hold a trace of heat, and a split lockbox waits half-buried under the ash.

choices.label: Steady yourself by the coals
choices.summary: Cup the last clean heat in both hands and let your breathing slow before the road asks anything else of you.

choices.label: Force the split lockbox
choices.summary: Kick the ash clear, wrench the lid the rest of the way open, and pocket the road coins hidden inside.
